services.jobs_desc: Penda mokili to koluka molo. 7 ba categories (technologie, nyanza, kozala…).
services.transport_desc: Kosangisa malamala taxi. Standard 500 + 200/km, Premium 500 + 350/km. Malade na wallet.
services.ads_desc: Ko kosala kozanga mpe kosensa mposo na JAPAP feed.
